title: cyanocephalus desertorum
intro: Cyanocephalus desertorum, also known as the "blue-headed thistle", is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyanocephalus desertorum are thought to include the treatment of digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
